title: scutellaria galericulata subsp. pubescens
intro: Scutellaria galericulata subsp. pubescens, also known as Chinese skullcap or Chinese helmetbell, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria galericulata plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria galericulata subsp. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to support liver health and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria galericulata subsp. pubescens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
